flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Alliant International University-San Diego rose 233% between 2020 and 2023 (6.7% → 22.2%).

flags.label: For-profit certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Alliant International University-San Diego are 126% above the for-profit certificate-predominant peer median ($66.7k vs $29.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Alliant International University-San Diego fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Alliant International University-San Diego fell 74% between 2007 and 2010 ($7.6k → $2.0k).
